text_x: Highlight Clip Bybit CEO: I Buy a Lot of Bitcoin to Give Myself a Safety Net In an April 23 interview with When Shift Happens, Bybit CEO Ben Zhou said he is not good at investing and is better at creating and building, so most of his asset allocation is defensive. He said the key to managing his personal wealth is not chasing aggressive returns, but making sure he has a fallback and does not have to worry about money if things go wrong. For that reason, he has bought a lot of Bitcoin and tends to hold it long term. In his view, the strategy is simple: when Bitcoin falls to a relatively cheap level, he buys more. — link

text_x: Canton Network, explained from first principles There has been a lot of discussion around Canton Network lately, but much of it misses the core point. This explanation from the founder of Five North is one of the clearest breakdowns I've seen of what Canton is, why it matters, and how it differs from public and permissioned blockchains. The key idea: Canton is built for capital markets, where privacy, compliance, and multi-party settlement are not optional. Unlike public chains, transaction details are not broadcast to everyone. Unlike isolated permissioned systems, Canton allows assets and institutions to interact on the same network. The result is a network designed for atomic settlement, privacy by default, and embedded compliance the kind of infrastructure regulated assets actually need. - 𝕏/@bc1pxxx Markets, compliance, Canton Network @PeterMM
author: admin#1923526882

text_x: Conversations about ZCash Zcash is one of the only crypto projects still holding cipherpunk ideals; fighting for actual private money (no backdoors, no "compliant privacy" theater) Scaling is the #1 priority and goal is 500-1000 TPS (Visa-level) so it can actually function as digital cash, not just a store of value Roadmap this year: quantum-recoverable wallets, faster block times (75s → 25s by midsummer), Tachyon shielded protocol on mainnet by year-end, and instant wallet open times (no more waiting to sync) The endgame is everyday spending, not just hodling. Bitcoin became "digital gold" —> More usage = bigger anonymity set = stronger privacy for everyone

text_x: GIWA Chain to Operate Under OP Enterprise Self-Managed Model, Upbit to Control Primary Sequencer The Optimism Foundation announced the signing of a memorandum of understanding with Dunamu, the parent company of South Korean crypto exchange Upbit, to co-develop GIWA Chain. The project was first announced by Upbit in September 2025 and is built using Optimism's OP Stack. Optimism emphasized that GIWA Chain is planned to be the first deployment under the OP Enterprise Self-Managed model. Under this model, Dunamu / Upbit will operate the primary sequencer and retain control over core network decisions, while the Optimism Foundation will provide engineering support, monitoring, and backup sequencer infrastructure. — link

Sun had earlier sued World Liberty for fraud, accusing the firm of coercion and freezing his holdings. — link

text_y: ZachXBT Accuses Tokenlon of Handling Illicit Funds On-chain investigator ZachXBT alleged that a significant portion of trading volume on decentralized exchange Tokenlon is linked to illicit sources, including romance scams, human trafficking, investment fraud, and Chinese underground markets. He also named the platform's co-founder and warned of potential future "actions" targeting Tokenlon and ImToken. ZachXBT further stated that multiple platforms he claims are associated with illegal fund flows, including Butter Network, HiFiSwap, Bridgers / SWFT, and Tokenlon that should be prioritized for enforcement. — link

text_x: QCP Market Colour, 4 May 2026 May the 4th: A New Hope Above 80k BTC breaks above $80k for the first time since January 31, moving in line with equities and drawing strength beyond just Strategy's accumulation. Spot ETF flows remain supportive, with Friday's ~$630m inflow more than offsetting the late-April outflows. The real test remains a clean close above the CME gap at $82k to $83k. Until then, expect rallies to be faded. Implied vols near year lows and the VIX around 17 suggest markets are looking past US-Iran tensions for now, but "Project Freedom" kicks off today and Iran's next move bears watching. Add in JOLTS, ADP, NFP, and earnings from Strategy, Coinbase, and Block, and choppiness looks likely through the week. Key Events Tue, 5 May: JOLTS Job Data | ISM Services PMI | Strategy Earnings Wed, 6 May: ADP Nonfarm Employment Data Thu, 7 May: Coinbase Earnings | Block Earnings Fri, 8 May: Nonfarm Payrolls (NFP) Read more:

text_x: GameStop Proposes to Acquire eBay at $125.00 Per Share > GameStop has proposed a $55.5B acquisition of eBay at $125 per share, offering a 46% premium in a mix of cash and stock. > The deal would be funded through GameStop's ~$9.4B cash reserves and up to $20B in financing, as it builds on a 5% stake in eBay. Source:

text_x: TST pumped over 110% today to its highest level since October last year. It started 24 hours ago when a newly created wallet was funded by Bitget with 900K USDC, deposited it to Hyperliquid, and began longing large amounts of TST. The position has now grown to 133.6M TST ($3M), and he is already up $1.05M, more than 50%. I believe this is the same entity currently manipulating ZEREBRO. Validators are set to vote on whether to delist TST, ZEREBRO, and several other perps in around 24 hours. If they vote to delist, the perps will settle at the 1-hour TWAP spot oracle price. This effectively gives them a way to get settled out of the perp position, without needing to exit through perp liquidity and eat slippage.
author: admin#2677926273

text_x: Trader Warns of Potential Supply-Control Risks in Several Tokens Eveningtraders flagged a group of tokens as having potential supply-control risk, warning that heavy concentration combined with "bear-trap" price action can be used to liquidate retail long and short positions and amplify abnormal volatility, citing past examples such as RIVER, COAI, MYX, PIPPIN, and RAVE. Tokens highlighted include SKYAI, GENIUS, DEXE, H, M, UAI, ZKP, as well as fan tokens such as LAZIO, CHZ, SANTOS, PORTO, and ALPINE. — link

text_x: Hyperliquid HIP-4 Event Contract Hits 6.05m Contracts (>$6m) in First-Day Volume Hyperliquid's HIP-4 event contract has officially launched. On its first trading day, the contract recorded a notional volume of 6.05 million contracts, capturing roughly 0.7% of the day's total prediction market share. By comparison, Kalshi recorded 546m contracts and Polymarket reached 190m contracts on the same day. H/T: @datadashboards — link

text_x: BlackRock's European iShares Bitcoin ETP (IB1T) Holds About 14,200 BTC as AUM Tops $1.1B BlackRock's European iShares Bitcoin ETP (IB1T) has surpassed $1.1 billion in assets under management, with holdings of roughly 14,200 BTC. The product launched in March 2025 and is listed on venues including Euronext Paris, Euronext Amsterdam, and Xetra, marking a key part of BlackRock's expansion into Europe's crypto ETP market. — link
author: admin#1534592031

text_x: Morgan Stanley Advises Clients to Hold 2%–4% Bitcoin Exposure Morgan Stanley's head of digital asset strategy, Amy Oldenburg, said at Bitcoin Conference that Bitcoin could eventually enter U.S. bank balance sheets, but the path will likely take longer than markets expect due to hurdles including Federal Reserve guidance, Basel rules, and regulatory requirements across multiple jurisdictions. She added that Morgan Stanley is currently advising clients to allocate 2%–4% to Bitcoin, though adoption among financial advisers remains slower, largely due to education and awareness gaps. — link
author: admin#1534592031

text_x: Highlight Clip Michael Saylor: There's Going to Be a Cambrian Explosion of Crypto Industry On April 28, 2026, Michael Saylor, Founder and Executive Chairman of Strategy, stated at Bitcoin 2026 Las Vegas that the global $3.5 trillion private credit market faces liquidity constraints. A small inflow of capital could trigger explosive growth in the digital credit sector and open up new growth space for the crypto industry. He pointed out that the crypto sector has entered an accelerated development stage with abundant innovations and is set to witness a Cambrian-style boom. The rising demand driven by digital capital inflows may lead to a Bitcoin supply shortage, driving up its price and boosting the rally of relevant crypto treasury sectors. — link
